verse_text: Greater love has no one than this, than to lay down one's life for his friends.

links.context: Jesus urges us to "give to the poor" ([[MAT.19:21]]) and to lay down our lives for others ([[JOH.15:13]]). But even such a selfless act done without love profits us nothing.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden

links.context: Jonathan expresses the greatest level of love one person can express for another. He is willing to die so David might live. Jesus displayed such love for all mankind, and calls for such love from His disciples ([[JOH.15:13]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
